'''sakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woodedly|woodedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woodedly|woodedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sakate|sakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sakatesher|sakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakatesherĂ«m|sakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sakatero|sakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sakateshĂ«|sakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakateshĂ«m|sakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisakatero|gokisakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisakateshĂ«|gokisakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakateshĂ«m|gokisakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosakankerom|gosakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosakankeshĂ«|gosakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakankeshĂ«m|gosakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosakankeya|gosakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sakaterom|sakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakatemu|sakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sakateya|sakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisakaterom|gokisakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakatemu|gokisakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisakateya|gokisakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sakakate|sakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sakakatesher|sakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakakatesherĂ«m|sakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sakakatero|sakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sakakateshĂ«|sakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakakateshĂ«m|sakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisakakatero|gokisakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisakakateshĂ«|gokisakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakakateshĂ«m|gokisakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosakakankerom|gosakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosakakankeshĂ«|gosakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakakankeshĂ«m|gosakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosakakankeya|gosakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sakakaterom|sakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakakatemu|sakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sakakateya|sakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisakakaterom|gokisakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakakatemu|gokisakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisakakateya|gokisakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠte|sĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠtesher|sĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠtero|sĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠtero|gokisĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠterom|sĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠtemu|sĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠteya|sĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠterom|gokisĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠkĂŠteya|gokisĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safkafte|safkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safkaftesher|safkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safkaftesherĂ«m|safkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safkaftero|safkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safkafteshĂ«|safkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safkafteshĂ«m|safkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafkaftero|gokisafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafkafteshĂ«|gokisafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafkafteshĂ«m|gokisafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafkafnkerom|gosafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafkafnkeshĂ«|gosafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafkafnkeshĂ«m|gosafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafkafnkeya|gosafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safkafterom|safkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safkaftemu|safkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safkafteya|safkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafkafterom|gokisafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafkaftemu|gokisafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafkafteya|gokisafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
